sales.description:
Macedonia, Tyntenoi, Octodrachm, ca. 480-470 BC, Extremely rare, Silver, NGC
Divinity standing right between two bullocks., Wheel with one vertical and two horizontal spokes in incuse square., Graded NGC Ch VF Strike: 5/5 Surface: 2/5, test cut. A coin of the highest rarity, attributed to the Illyrian tribe of the Tyntenoi (or Tynteni), unknown outside of its coinage bearing the legend "TΥNTENON". This coinage is extremely rare overall, so much so that the octodrachm is not mentioned in stand...
